name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.RollDownStairsHelper.MaxAngVelAroundFrontwardAxis
summary: Only used if applyNewRollingCheatingTorques or applyHelPerTorqueToAlign defined to true : maximal angular velocity around frontward axis of the pelvis to apply cheating torques.
remarks:
Default value = 2.0f.
            Min value = -1.0f.
            Max value = 10.0f.
